recommendations.title: The Other End of the Line
recommendations.overview: An employee at an Indian call-center travels to San Francisco to be with a guy she falls for over the phone.

recommendations.title: The Last Black Man in San Francisco
recommendations.overview: Jimmie Fails dreams of reclaiming the Victorian home his grandfather built in the heart of San Francisco. Joined on his quest by his best friend Mont, Jimmie searches for belonging in a rapidly changing city that seems to have left them behind.

recommendations.title: Coyote Ugly
recommendations.overview: Graced with a velvet voice, 21-year-old Violet Sanford heads to New York to pursue her dream of becoming a songwriter only to find her aspirations sidelined by the accolades and notoriety she receives at her "day" job as a barmaid at Coyote Ugly. The

recommendations.title: Friendship!
recommendations.overview: A young man from East Germany travels to San Francisco to search for his father, who fled 12 years ago. Together with his best friend, he starts the journey from New York with no money and the only word they ever learned in english-lessons: "friendsh

recommendations.title: Metallica and San Francisco Symphony: S&M2
recommendations.overview: S&M2, the live concert film from Metallica and the San Francisco Symphony is the concert event of the year!  S&M2 features 20 songs from the two-night event that opened San Francisco’s new Chase Center, with many Metallica fan favourites and two uniq

recommendations.title: The Diary of a Teenage Girl
recommendations.overview: Minnie Goetze is a 15-year-old aspiring comic-book artist, coming of age in the haze of the 1970s in San Francisco. Insatiably curious about the world around her, Minnie is a pretty typical teenage girl. Oh, except that she’s sleeping with her mother

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Problemista
recommendations.overview: Alejandro is an aspiring toy designer from El Salvador, struggling to bring his unusual ideas to life in New York City. As time on his work visa runs out, a job assisting an erratic art-world outcast becomes his only hope to stay in the country and r

recommendations.title: Two Sons of Francisco
recommendations.overview: The story of Francisco, a very simple and poor man whose dream was to see his children become country music stars, and who made all the efforts to make it happen.

recommendations.title: Chelsea Peretti: One of the Greats
recommendations.overview: Standup special filmed live at the Palace of Fine Arts in San Francisco.
